_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED FOR PTERODACTYL PANEL IMPORT
name: Self-Hostable Backend API
author: repgraphics@euphoriadevelopment.uk
description: Runs the Euphoria self-hostable backend API (Fastify). Supports optional blueprint-translations auto-fetch on startup.
startup: if [ -f /home/container/package-lock.json ]; then npm ci --omit=dev; else npm install --omit=dev; fi; npm start

installation.script:
#!/bin/ash
set -eu

cd /mnt/server

if [ -f package-lock.json ]; then
  npm ci --omit=dev
else
  npm install --omit=dev
fi

variables.name: Server Port
variables.description: Port used by the API inside the container.

variables.name: Auto Fetch Translations
variables.description: Fetch blueprint translation JSON files during startup.

variables.name: Translations Source Base URL
variables.description: Base URL for blueprint-translations raw files.

variables.name: Translations Remote Paths
variables.description: Comma-separated remote directories checked for translation files.

variables.name: Translations Timeout (ms)
variables.description: HTTP timeout per file when syncing translations.

variables.name: GitHub Tree Lookup
variables.description: Use GitHub API tree fallback to auto-discover JSON paths in the source repository.

variables.name: Translations File List
variables.description: Optional comma-separated file list to sync (blank means use local JSON files).
